tasks.title: Subnetting a Small Office
tasks.description: Given a /24 network, carve out specific subnets for different departments using FLSM.

tasks.title: VLSM Campus Design
tasks.description: Design an efficient addressing scheme for a multi-site campus using VLSM.

tasks.title: Troubleshoot the Mask
tasks.description: Analyze a network diagram and identify misconfigured subnet masks causing communication failures.
